overview_purpose_1.title: Overview and purpose
overview_purpose_1.description: Covers kilo's high-level purpose, command-line invocation, major editor state, core editor loop, basic user-facing features, rendering, file loading and saving, search behavior, and common keyboard shortcuts.
example_questions: What is kilo and what is its intended purpose?
How is kilo invoked from the command line?
Which three keyboard shortcuts are emphasized in kilo's overview?
What are kilo's core user-facing features?
Which global structure holds most of kilo's editor state?
How does kilo save the current buffer?
